title: Smoky Ukrainian Sausage Skillet
description: A hearty, spicy skillet dish featuring Ukrainian kielbasa sausage, smoky flavors, and a hint of curry.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced kielbasa sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove kielbasa from skillet and set aside.
Add chopped onion, bell pepper, and minced garlic to skillet. Cook until vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add diced potatoes, curry powder, and smoked paprika to skillet. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Return kielbasa to skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
